title: ₹8 Lakh Crore Investment Proposals in 18 Months; Chhattisgarh Tops Key Investor
description: Chhattisgarh has received investment proposals worth nearly Rs 8 lakh crore over the past 18 months and secured top rankings in regulatory ease and institutional environment in the CRISIL–NITI Aayog Investment Friendliness Index (IFI) 2026. The state also ranked second in environmental resilience, reflecting improvements in governance and ease of doing business. Investments have been proposed across sectors including semiconductors, artificial intelligence, textiles, pharmaceuticals and agro-processing.
content:
Chhattisgarh has attracted investment proposals of nearly ₹8 lakh crore in the past 18 months and emerged as the country’s top state on key parameters in the CRISIL–NITI Aayog Investment Friendliness Index (IFI) 2026, officials said on Sunday.

title: Pocket-size AI: Powerful phones star at China show
description: Chinese tech firms were showcasing advanced agentic smartphones at the 2026 World Artificial Intelligence Conference (WAIC) in Shanghai - heralding what may be to come.
content:

title: Can China overtake the US in AI? Kimi K3 has reignited the debate
description: China's latest open-source AI model is challenging US dominance and intensifying the global race for artificial intelligence.
content: China's race to catch the United States in artificial intelligence has entered a new phase with the launch of Kimi K3, an open-source AI model developed by Beijing-based start-up Moonshot AI. The release has drawn global attention because the company... [4151 chars]

title: Emerging markets poised to outperform in H2 2026 amid attractive valuations, AI
description: Emerging markets are expected to remain well placed in the second half of 2026, with attractive valuations, easing inflation and monetary policy support likely to sustain their relative outperformance, while investors may increasingly favour equities linked to artificial intelligence and the broader technology cycle, according to a research report by HSBC.

title: Step Into the ‘Zone of Genius’ (Before A.I. Takes Your Job)
description: A decades-old self-help concept is gaining new purchase among people searching for meaningful work in the age of artificial intelligence.
content:

title: Jaishankar meets Zanzibar President; resolves to expand bilateral AI, tech, education ties
description: External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar met Zanzibar President and Chairman of the Revolutionary Council Hussein Ali Mwinyi in the national capital on Sunday, aiming to deepen bilateral ties across key sectors, including digital technology, water infrastructure, artificial intelligence, healthcare, and higher education.

title: Why Sarasota journalism matters more than ever in the AI age
description: Artificial intelligence is changing how news is made, but Sarasota Herald-Tribune reporters still rely on curiosity, shoe-leather reporting and trust.
content:

The old ways of doing journalism have become more valuable than ever.
